pages.text: The second stage requires defeating the Cursed Keeper. You must craft a full Energium Armor set to enter the Cursed Forest biome without fatal curse effects.

pages.title: Cursed Forest Biome
pages.text: Accessible only with $(l)full Energium Armor$(). Contains Cursed Knights and Squires. The Cursed Castle spawns at biome center.

Combat Phases:$(br2)$(l)Phase 1 (Invulnerable):$()$(br)- Summons 3 waves of Cursed Knights/Squires$(br2)$(l)Phase 2 (Vulnerable):$()$(br)- Flamethrower$(br)- Air shield (invincibility)$(br)- Stalagmite piercing$(br)- Water healing (increase chance below 350 HP)

pages.title: Rewards
pages.text: Drops:$(br)1 Luck Coin$(br)8 Cursed Keys$(br2)Unlocks the Keeper's Box on castle's 3rd floor with permanent elemental stone choice.

pages.title: Cursed Vaults
pages.text: Use 8 Cursed Keys to open vaults in the castle. Contains rare exclusive resources.
